underlying_goal: Remove JetBrains Mono font from paper titles, commit/push changes, and explore token efficiency improvements for API calls
friction_detail: Session hit a rate limit and had issues with remote-control commands firing multiple times near the end.
brief_summary: User wanted to remove a font from CSS and push changes, then asked several questions about API token usage and efficiency; the CSS fix and push succeeded, Q&A was helpful, but the session ended prematurely due to rate limits.
